blocks.text: Bodo/Glimt sink Inter Milan — Norway's greatest European club night
A seismic Champions League result. Norwegian club football at its European peak — and Atalanta's 4-1 demolition of Dortmund on the same night confirms the round of 16 is delivering pure chaos.
🎮 13:00 — rain (Håvard Nygaard) opens DraculaN Season 5 for 100 Thieves vs MANA
